title: Why Deals Stall After the Demo

seo.metaTitle: Why Deals Stall After the Demo | Business Impact Canada
seo.metaDescription: The demo went great. Then silence. The recording shows exactly when the deal stopped moving.
seo.ogTitle: Why Deals Stall After the Demo
seo.ogDescription: The deal died before you logged off. The recording shows exactly where.

ogImage.headline: Why Deals Stall After the Demo
ogImage.subhead: The deal died before you logged off.

components.answer: Deals stall after the demo because the rep handed a decision to a champion who was not equipped to survive the internal conversation. The moment the call ended, that champion walked into a room full of stakeholders they were never prepared to face.

components.heading: The Champion Walked Into a Room You Were Never In
components.body: The rep left the call feeling good. The champion left the call holding something they were not equipped to carry.

components.headline: Want to see exactly where your deal left the room?
components.subtext: Most reps never find out. The recording knows.

components.attribution: Reconstructed from behavioral signals observed across recorded B2B sales conversations. All details anonymized.

exchanges.speaker: Rep
exchanges.line: So does this solve for the use case you mentioned last week with the ops team?

exchanges.speaker: Prospect
exchanges.line: Yeah, yeah, I think so. I mean — we'd have to look at how it integrates. But yeah, this is great.

signals.label: Language specificity collapse
signals.description: The prospect went from detailed operational language to vague generalities.

signals.label: Topic deflection
signals.description: When asked directly about internal criteria, the prospect redirected.

signals.label: Response latency and filler spike
signals.description: The double-confirm followed by a hedge is a measurable verbal pattern.

components.headline: Every demo has its moment. Most reps never find it.

faqs.question: Why do prospects go quiet after a demo?
faqs.answer: They usually go quiet because the internal decision conversation became harder than the call made it seem.

faqs.question: Can a recording show where a deal stalled?
faqs.answer: Yes. The recording often shows the moment language cooled, specificity collapsed, or the prospect stopped committing to concrete next steps.

components.headline: What the Recording Shows
components.body: Upload your demo call. We analyze the moment the energy shifted — the questions that stopped, the pauses that stretched, the language that cooled.

components.headline: What the Recording Shows
components.body: Upload your call. We analyze the moment the energy shifted — the questions that stopped, the pauses that stretched, the language that cooled.
